context: Evaluates the agent's ability to run the post-merge drift check, correctly classify signal strength, and respect the never-auto-flip-ADRs rule.

checklist.name: Drift check run
checklist.description: merge-status-sync.sh --dry-run (or equivalent) run against the merged PR before concluding

checklist.name: Drift correctly identified
checklist.description: ADR-032 identified as drifted (still proposed) with the correct direct signal

checklist.name: Never auto-flip ADRs
checklist.description: ADR-032 reported as flagged for confirmation, never silently flipped to accepted

checklist.name: No false positive on the plan
checklist.description: The already-done plan is not reported as drift
